case_title: CHRISTOPHER HENRY VS. ALI ABDULLA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO APRIL 29, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPARTMENT 506. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE DISMISSED AS SETTLED.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED JAN-08-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAATARSUREN, GANNA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,866.01 FILED BY HENRY, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT ABDULLA, ALI BAATARSUREN, GANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED JAN-06-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABDULLA, ALI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-29-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER HENRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALI ABDULLA IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY, STILLWATER INSURANCE GROUP, ISSUED A CHECK FOR THE AMOUNT AGREED TO AT THE LAST HEARING. THE ISSUED CHECK WAS MADE OUT TO THE WRONG PERSON/INCORRECT NAME. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT HE WAS CONTACTED BY THE INSURANCE COMPANY AND WAS INFOMRED THAT THE INSURANCE COMPANY WAS ISSUING A CORRECTED CHECK AND SENDING IT TO HIM ON MARCH 4, 2021. MATTER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO ALLOW SUFFICIENT TIME FOR PLAINTIFF TO RECEIVE INSURANCE PAYMENT. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT RECEIVED AS AGREED TO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AND JUDGMENT MAY BE ISSUED AT THE TIME. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-28-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK, (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-10-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER HENRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALI ABDULLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GANNA BAATARSUREN IS PRESENT. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. DEFENDANTS WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $3922. DEFENDANT WILL PAY $156.00 ON THE 28TH OF EACH MONTH, STARTING ON FEB-28-2021, FOR 25 MONTHS WITH A FINAL PAYMENT OF $22 DUE ON THE 26TH MONTH. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT PROGRESS REPORT DATES ONLY IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. AFTER THE MARCH 10TH HEARING, PROGRESS REPORTS SHALL CONTINUE AT 6-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE OF MAR-28-2023 AT WHICH TIME IF NO APPEARANCES THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
